author: eveanthro
title: Doc-vs-implementation drift in DEVELOPMENT_PHILOSOPHY.md architectural rules
notes: Three documented architectural rules checked against implementation. Claim 1 (thin orchestrators): 2/3 files confirmed large but override_handlers.py is 632 lines not 856. Claim 2 (dynamic imports): all 4 files use importlib but for legitimate lazy loading of optional deps (PIL) and language plugin modules. Claim 3 (state bypass): examples write session/batch working files, not persisted state (state.json/plan.json). config.py is base infrastructure, not a command module. Real doc-code drift, but no runtime bugs or architectural failures.
